description: Creates a 2D polar coordinate graph with concentric radial gridlines, configurable radius bounds, and angular divisions.
utility: Create a 2D polar coordinate graph for polar functions and polar point placement

arguments.name: radius
arguments.description: Maximum radius. Optional step controls concentric circle spacing.

arguments.name: grid
arguments.description: Show polar grid (concentric circles + radial lines)

alternates.description: Polar graph with auto grid spacing

alternates.syntax: p2d(at(row, col), height, width, radius(rMax, rStep))
alternates.description: Polar graph with custom concentric circle spacing

alternates.syntax: p2d(at(row, col), height, width, radius(rMax), grid())
alternates.description: Polar graph showing concentric circles and radial lines

alternates.variant: Polar graph with grid and shadow
alternates.syntax: p2d(at(row, col), height, width, radius(rMax), grid(), br(0.5))

examples.scenario: Polar graph with grid for plotting rose curves and spirals
Polar point placement with variables for length and angle
examples.expression:
G = p2d(at(2,4), 20, 20,range(0,10,1), grid())
l=5
ang=30
polarpoint(G, l, ang)

examples.scenario: Polar point on a geometry graph with angle change animation
examples.expression:
G2 = g2d(at(0,30), 20, range(-10,10), grid(), type(geometry))
l=5
ang=30
polarpoint(G2, l, ang)
change(ang,210)

examples.scenario: Plot a polar rose curve on p2d
examples.expression:
G = p2d(at(2,4), 20, 20, range(0, 10, 1), grid())
plot(G, "2 + cos(3*theta)")
